reviews.comment:
Amplio cómodo y con muy buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Spacious, comfortable and with very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROenZ1Sjh3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Malisima la atención. Super lentos y poco cordiales. Particularmente el playero Juanjo (un maleducado y violento). CERO RECOMENDABLE

(Translated by Google)
The service was terrible. Extremely slow and unfriendly. Especially Juanjo, the attendant (rude and aggressive). I DO NOT RECOMMEND THIS SERVICE AT ALL.

reviewReply.comment: Llama la atención su mala experiencia, particularmente con el vendedor Juan Jose que se caracteriza por ser exactamente lo contrario de lo que ud expone.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURONnNENkNREAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Perfect fuel supply. Convenience store, very helpful employee, prices among the most expensive I paid in the almost 8000 km of roads in Argentina on this trip. But there was an elderly couple who seemed to own the place, where people would enter the store asking about the bathroom and they would say there wasn't one, but if you bought something in the store then they would point you to the bathroom which was "hidden"!!!!!

(Original)
Abastecimento perfeito. Loja de conveniência, funcionário muito solícito em tudo, preços um dos mais caros que paguei nos quase 8000 km de estradas na Argentina nesta viagem. Mas tinha um casal de srs de idade que pareciam serem os donos do lugar, onde as pessoas adentravam a loja perguntando do banheiro e eles diziam q não tinha, mas se você comprasse algo na loja então eles lhes indicavam o banheiro que fica “escondido”!!!!!

reviewReply.comment: Sr RS, efectivamente los baños son de uso exclusivo para socios del ACA y clientes de la tienda, como claramente lo indica la cartelería ubicada en tienda y playa. Los baños de uso público están en el sector exterior.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROb3RqakRBEAE

reviews.comment:
Hay un playero flaquito que es lo más! Que pibe buena onda!!!! Da gusto que la atención al público sea así. Por eso merece mis 5

(Translated by Google)
There's a skinny beach bum who's the best! What a cool guy! It's nice to see customer service like this. That's why he deserves my 5 stars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURObk12OThRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicio de YPF-ACA

(Translated by Google)
Excellent YPF-ACA service station
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROdUx2WlVnEAE

reviews.comment:
Pase a tomar un café nomás y muy poca onda el que atiende

(Translated by Google)
I just stopped by for a coffee and the guy who served me was really unfriendly

reviewReply.comment: Rodrigo vamos a tratar de ponerle mas onda al que atiende. Gracias por tu sugerencia, que para nosotros es un aporte.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOXzZ2UFl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Exelente, no solo por la comida que era casera y fresca, si no por la atención que nos brindaron tanto la gente de la YPF que nos trataron excelentemente, como la señorita del ACA Ludmila quien nos ayudó a organizar el viaje hacia puerto pirámides con recomendaciones y puntos ACA dónde descansar.
Inmensamente gracias!!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! Not only was the food homemade and fresh, but the service we received was outstanding, both from the YPF staff who treated us wonderfully, and from Ludmila at the ACA who helped us plan our trip to Puerto Pirámides with recommendations and suggestions for ACA rest stops.
Thank you so much!

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias Ga Bye, su comentario nos reconforta y nos confirma el rumbo fijado por el ACA.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1981887218224238304/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOOC1fUXhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
